vibe: Master gardener command center, high-tech organic fusion, precise, calm, reliable

colors.description: Base is warm sand with deep forest green foreground. Primary is moss green. Accent is a striking terracotta for alerts and ASI triggers.

hierarchy_rules: H1 (Hero/Main Heading): text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter
H2 (Section Heading): text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight

rules: Mobile-first responsive grids always. Start with grid-cols-1.
Grid items MUST be direct children of the grid container.
Utilize h-full to ensure widgets stretch to match neighbors.
Generous Spacing Philosophy: Use 2-3x more spacing (p-6, p-8) to give data room to breathe.
No heavy shadows by default. Use shadow-sm ONLY on hover or for active floating elements.
Expose the grid skeleton. The dashboard should feel like a precise instrument.

customizations.cards: Remove large border radii. Use rounded-sm for a tighter, 'Control Room' aesthetic.
customizations.buttons: Square edges or minimal rounding. Always explicitly set hover text and bg colors.
customizations.charts: Integrate ambient data visualization. Avoid generic defaults; use the earth-toned chart variables.
customizations.tables: Dense, clean layouts without alternating row colors. Use a 1px bottom border to separate rows.

rules: Transitions must be 0.2s ease. Explicitly target transform and opacity.
Avoid bouncy animations. This is a planetary management tool; it should feel calm and reliable.
Ensure all interactive elements have explicit hover and focus states (e.g. focus:ring-2).

image_urls.description: Dense green pine forest aerial view
image_urls.usage: Use as a muted background with a heavy white/sand overlay (e.g., bg-white/80) to give texture to the header.
Thumbnail image or sidebar context for the swarm deployment controls.

image_urls.description: High-tech abstract topographical map of a lush forest
image_urls.usage: Primary visual base for the interactive map section.

icons.instruction: Use stroke-width 1.5 to match the technical, precise dashboard aesthetic.

rules: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='swarm-deploy-btn').
Ensure contrast ratios meet APCA standards. Deep green text on warm sand backgrounds is required.
Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all dashboard updates.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly apply the HSL variables provided to the globals.css to achieve the Earthy Light Theme.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout. Make full use of the screen real-estate but maintain clear boundaries with 1px borders.
Do NOT use external placeholder services for images. ONLY use the provided URLs in the media section.
Ensure the dashboard feels like an ambient, integrated command center rather than isolated chaotic widgets.
Always include `data-testid` on key UI components.
